home.heroTitle: AI Image Toolkit for instant optimization, restoration, and conversion
home.heroSubtitle: Upscale, remove backgrounds, and compress images — no Photoshop required.
home.demoHeading: See the result before you sign up
home.demoSubheading: Drag the slider to compare real before and after output.
home.demoCaption_upscale: Sharper photos and screenshots — detail restored, not just stretched.
home.demoCaption_background: Clean cutouts on white or transparent PNG — ready for your store.
home.demoCaption_compress: Smaller files that still look great on web and social.
home.toolsSubheading: Everything you need to prepare images for web, social media, and e-commerce — in one toolkit.
home.toolGroup_optimize_desc: Prepare files for web — smaller size, right format, exact dimensions.
home.toolGroup_enhance_desc: Fix low-res photos and get clean cutouts — no Photoshop required.
home.toolCard_tool_resize: Resize to exact dimensions for social posts, banners, and product pages.
home.toolCard_tool_compress: Reduce file size while keeping the original format and quality.
home.toolCard_tool_convert: Convert between PNG, JPG, WebP, and AVIF with smart quality settings.
home.toolCard_tool_upscale_ai: Enhance resolution up to 4× — great for blurry photos and old images.
home.toolCard_tool_background_removal: Smart cutouts with professional edge refinement.
home.whySubtitle: Fast, AI-powered, and runs in your browser — no software to install.
home.why_routing_body: Upload, process, and download in seconds — built for daily workflows, not one-off edits.
home.why_quality_body: Upscale, cut out subjects, and optimize files with results you'll actually ship.
home.why_speed_body: Works in any browser. Perfect for e-commerce, social media, and content teams.
home.socialProofHeading: Trusted by creators and store owners
home.planHighlight_free: Try everything — 3 credits/day with watermarked previews.
home.planHighlight_basic: No watermark — 100 credits/month for regular use.
home.planHighlight_starter: HD downloads + 200 credits/month for growing teams.
home.planHighlight_pro: Batch processing, API access, and commercial license.
home.trustSubtitle: We process photos for you — not for training AI models. Here's how we protect your files.
home.trust_retention_body: Uploaded files are deleted automatically after 24 hours.
home.trust_noTraining_body: We never use your images to train or improve AI models. Your content is used only to deliver your results.
home.trust_https_body: All uploads and downloads use encrypted HTTPS connections.
home.trust_euStorage_body: Files are stored securely on infrastructure in the European Union.
home.examplesSubheading: Before and after results from actual workflows — product photos, old images, and heavy PNG files.
home.example_background_desc: Background removed for e-commerce listings and ads.
home.example_upscale_desc: Low-resolution image restored with sharper detail.
home.example_compress_desc: Smaller files that look the same on web and social.
home.finalCtaTitle: Ready to ship better images faster?
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Start free — upgrade when you need more credits or watermark-free downloads.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.freePlanHint: Most users start with the Free plan
pricing.creditsIntro: Each tool costs credits based on processing type. Sharp tools are instant and cheap; AI tools use external models.
pricing.creditsSharp: Resize, compress, convert — {cost} credit each (Sharp, instant)
pricing.creditsAi: AI upscale & background removal — {cost} credits each

tool.uploadCta: Drop an image or click to upload
tool.processingKeepOpen: Processing your image — please don't close this page
tool.processingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Keep this tab open until the result appears.
tool.processingAiNote: AI tools may take 10–30 seconds. We're checking automatically until it's ready.
tool.processingUpscaleHint: AI enhancement usually takes 10–30 seconds. Keep this tab open.
tool.processingSlowHint: Still working — large images or AI models can take a bit longer. Please wait.
tool.readyToProcessHint: Upload an image, then click Process to start.
tool.resizeDimensionsHint: Enter at least width or height in pixels.
tool.resizeQualityHint: Controls the downloaded file quality for compressed formats (JPG, WebP, AVIF). Does not change pixel dimensions.
tool.resizeQualityPlanLimit: Plan limits: Free up to 70%, Basic up to 90%, Starter and Pro up to 100%.
tool.resizeUpscaleSizeNote: Enlarging adds new pixels — the file may be larger than the original, which is expected.
tool.upscaleQualityHint: Smart detects photo, text, or artwork and applies the best upscaling strategy for clarity without artifacts.
tool.scale2xHint: Recommended for real photos, social posts, and UI captures.
tool.scale4xHint: For old, blurry, or very low-resolution images.
tool.upscaleWarn4xGeneric: 4× may distort text on screenshots or oversmooth artwork. Smart mode avoids this automatically.
tool.upscaleCompareHint: Drag the slider handle to compare original vs enhanced.
tool.upscaleReasonPhotoDetail: Photo detected — detail recovery and artifact reduction applied
tool.upscaleReasonPhotoFace: Photo detected — face detail recovery enabled
tool.upscaleReasonScreenshotText: Text-heavy UI detected — edge-safe upscaling without hallucinated detail
tool.upscaleReasonScreenshotUi: Screenshot detected — text clarity and edge sharpening prioritized
tool.upscaleReasonArtLines: Artwork detected — line consistency preserved, no texture overfitting
tool.upscaleWarnScreenshot4x: 4× can distort small text on UI captures — 2× is recommended for screenshots.
tool.upscaleWarnArt4x: 4× may oversmooth flat illustration areas — Smart mode uses 2× for artwork.
tool.validationFileRequired: Please upload an image before processing.
tool.validationResizeRequired: Enter a width or height before processing.
tool.validationResizeInvalid: Width and height must be positive numbers up to 10,000 px.
tool.validationGeneric: Please check your settings and try again.
tool.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
tool.errorUploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check the file size and format.
tool.errorProcessingTimeout: Processing took too long. Please try again.
tool.errorAiUnavailable: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
tool.errorAiModelConfig: Background removal is not configured correctly. Please try again later or contact support.
tool.errorAiBilling: The AI service could not run this job. Please contact support if this continues.
tool.errorAiAuth: The AI service could not be reached. Please try again later.
tool.errorTooLarge: Image is too large. Please upload a file under your plan limit.
tool.errorInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this tool. Upgrade your plan or wait for your credits to reset.
tool.batchUploadCta: Drop images or click to upload multiple
tool.batchCreditsTotal: Processing {count} images will use {total} {total, plural, one {credit} other {credits}}.
tool.commercialLicenseBadge: Commercial usage license included with your Pro plan.
tool.convertBackgroundApplied: Transparent areas were filled with your chosen background.
tool.convertBackgroundNoAlpha: This file likely has no transparency — background fill will not change the image.
tool.convertBackgroundWhiteLossless: White keeps transparency on PNG/WebP/AVIF. Choose black, blur, or auto to flatten, or export as JPEG.
tool.convertBackgroundOpaqueNote: Transparent or uniform solid backgrounds will be replaced with your chosen fill.
tool.compressQualityHint: Maximum saves the most space. Balanced is recommended for most images. Low keeps the highest quality.
tool.formatReasonAlreadyOptimized: Image was already optimized — kept the original file.
tool.formatReasonCompressRetry: Retried with lossy compression for a smaller file size.
tool.formatReasonCompressLossy: Lossy compression for the smallest possible file size.
tool.formatReasonPhotoAvif: Photo detected — AVIF for maximum compression efficiency
tool.formatReasonPhotoAvifMax: Photo detected — AVIF at highest quality tier
tool.formatReasonPhotoWebpFast: Photo detected — WebP for fast export
tool.formatReasonPhotoJpeg: Photo detected — JPEG for broad compatibility
tool.formatReasonScreenshotLossless: Screenshot detected — lossless WebP keeps sharp text and edges
tool.formatReasonScreenshotPng: Screenshot detected — PNG preserves fine text detail
tool.formatReasonTransparencyWebp: Transparency detected — lossless WebP preserves alpha channel
tool.formatReasonTransparencyPng: Transparency detected — PNG for maximum fidelity
tool.formatReasonLogoLossless: Logo detected — lossless output preserves flat colors
tool.formatReasonLogoPng: Logo detected — PNG for pixel-perfect edges
tool.formatReasonGraphicWebp: Graphic detected — WebP optimized for illustrations
tool.formatReasonGraphicPng: Graphic detected — PNG for maximum fidelity
tool.formatReasonFallbackJpeg: Modern codecs unavailable — delivered JPEG instead
tool.convertQualityIntentHint: Web is recommended for most sites. Max compression prioritizes smaller files. Lossless preserves every pixel.
tool.convertTargetFormatHint: Auto analyzes your image and picks the best format and quality. Override for advanced control.
tool.convertBackgroundFillHint: Replaces transparent pixels or a uniform solid background (e.g. white product shots). White keeps transparency on lossless formats.
tool.validationConvertInvalid: Invalid conversion options. Please review your settings.
tool.validationCompressInvalid: Invalid compression options. Please review your settings.
tool.validationBgRemovalInvalid: Invalid background removal options. Please review your settings.
tool.bgSubjectModeHint: Auto detects products, portraits, or objects and routes to the best pipeline.
tool.bgEdgeQualityHint: Higher modes apply alpha matting refinement and halo removal — slower but sharper edges.
tool.bgReasonProductCutout: Product detected — hard edges, no feather, e-commerce ready
tool.bgReasonPortraitMatting: Portrait detected — hair-safe matting with natural edge blending
tool.bgReasonObjectBalanced: Object detected — balanced edge refinement without harsh cuts
tool.bgReasonUserPortrait: Portrait mode — preserves hair and skin edges
tool.bgShadowRecoveryHint: Keeps the natural drop shadow after background removal — great for product photos on white backgrounds.

legal.legalDisclaimer: This page is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute legal advice.
legal.commercialIntro: Pro subscribers receive a non-exclusive license to use images processed through PixiqueAi in commercial projects, subject to the terms below.
legal.commercialBullet1: You may use outputs in ads, websites, products, and client work.
legal.commercialBullet2: You may not resell raw outputs as stock or compete directly with PixiqueAi.
legal.commercialBullet3: License applies per processed output while your Pro subscription is active.
legal.commercialDisclaimer: This summary is not legal advice. Contact us for enterprise or white-label terms.
legal.termsIntro: These Terms govern your use of PixiqueAi (www.pixiqueai.com). By creating an account or using our tools, you agree to these Terms.
legal.termsSection1Body: PixiqueAi provides browser-based image processing tools (resize, compress, convert, AI upscale, background removal). We may update features, limits, or pricing with reasonable notice.
legal.termsSection2Body: You retain ownership of images you upload. You grant us a limited license to process your files solely to deliver the requested output. We do not use your images to train AI models.
legal.termsSection3Body: You may not upload illegal content, malware, or material you do not have rights to process. We may suspend accounts that abuse the service or exceed fair use.
legal.termsSection4Body: Paid plans renew monthly via Stripe until cancelled. Refunds are handled case-by-case for billing errors; contact us within 14 days of charge.
legal.privacyIntro: This policy explains how PixiqueAI collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our services.
legal.privacySection3Body:
We implement technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

Access to data is limited to authorized personnel and only when necessary to operate the service, investigate technical issues, prevent abuse, or provide support you request.
legal.privacySection4Body: Data and files are stored on secure cloud infrastructure. Data transfers use encrypted HTTPS connections.
legal.privacySection6Body:
You may request access, correction, or deletion of data associated with your account by contacting us by email.

EU users benefit from GDPR rights, including access, rectification, erasure, portability, and objection to processing.
legal.privacySection7Body: We may update this policy periodically. Any material changes will be published on this page.
legal.cookiesIntro: PixiqueAi uses cookies and similar technologies to keep you signed in and understand how the site is used.
legal.cookiesSection1Body: Required for authentication, session security, and checkout. These cannot be disabled while using the service.
legal.cookiesSection2Body: We may use privacy-friendly analytics to measure traffic and improve the product. No advertising cookies are used.
legal.cookiesSection3Body: You can block cookies in your browser settings, but some features (sign-in, billing) may not work correctly.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Have a question, found an issue, or have an improvement idea? Send us a message and we'll get back to you soon.
contact.feedbackHint: Have a feature you'd like to see, a UX suggestion, or any idea to help us improve the platform?
contact.consentLabel: I agree that the information provided may be used to respond to my request.
contact.successDescription: Thank you — we received your message and will reply by email as soon as possible.
contact.responseTime: We typically reply within 1–2 business days.
contact.error_sendFailed: We couldn't send your message. Please try again later.
contact.error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.error_messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.
contact.error_consentRequired: You must accept data processing to submit the form.

admin.confirmDeleteImage: Delete this image from storage and database?
admin.economicsDescription: Margin if subscribers use their full credit quota. Max cost = all credits on AI (5 each). Realistic mix: 70% Sharp / 30% AI.
admin.economicsFootnote: Stripe ~2.9% + €0.25. Sharp = 1 credit (~€0). AI = 5 credits (~€0.02/job on Replicate). Post-AI WebP optimization runs on Sharp (€0).

dashboard.upgradeBody: Upgrade to Starter or Pro for HD downloads, higher quotas, and priority processing.
dashboard.noImagesYet: No images yet. Process a photo with any tool to see it here.
dashboard.maxUploadPerFile: Up to {mb} MB per uploaded file

footer.tagline: AI-powered image optimization for web, social, and e-commerce.

auth.signupEmailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter the email address for your account and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetPasswordCheckEmailLead: If <highlight>{email}</highlight> matches an email address we have on file, we've sent you an email with a link to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordCheckEmailBackup: If you entered your matching backup email address, we've sent the link to that address as well.
auth.resetPasswordCheckEmailSpam: If you haven't received the email in 5 minutes, check your spam folder, <resend>resend</resend>, or <reconfirm>reconfirm your email address</reconfirm>.

auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. You can sign in now.
